# fly_ext_mysql (Resource)

Manages a Fly.io MySQL extension.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "fly_ext_mysql" "example" {
  name   = "my-mysql"
  org    = "personal"
  region = "iad"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the extension. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `org` (String) The organization slug. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `region` (String) The region. Changing this forces a new resource.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the extension.
- `status` (String) The extension status.
